title: How the AI chip boom helped South Korea overtake India among the world's largest stock markets

title: OpenAI's Sam Altman backtracks on AI job-loss fears, says top AI adopters are hiring more workers
summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has softened his stance on AI-driven job losses, arguing that companies adopting AI most aggressively are often hiring more workers. While acknowledging public anxiety over automation, he said human interaction remains central to business and society.

title: The Quantum Valley bet: Inside Amaravati’s race against FOMO
summary: Governments around the world are racing to build quantum capabilities. One effort is in Amaravati where Andhra Pradesh is bypassing global hardware restrictions to build an indigenous Quantum Valley. Can Chandrababu Naidu, the state’s chief minister, turn raw talent into commercial power?

title: Anthropic's Claude hit by major outage affecting chat, API and developer tools
summary: Claude, the AI chatbot developed by Anthropic, experienced a widespread outage on Tuesday, affecting its web platform, app, API services, and developer tools. Hundreds of users reported issues accessing Claude Chat

title: Apple agrees to submit India financials in long-pending antitrust case
summary: The case is Apple's most high-profile regulatory headache in India, a key growth ​market where it has rapidly expanded iPhone production as it diversifies beyond China. The iPhone accounts for 9% ​of India's smartphone market, from about 2% five years ago, according to Counterpoint Research data.

title: Nvidia and Marvell CEOs highlight role of connectivity in powering next-generation AI infra
summary: Marvell stocks soared over 30% after the Nvidia chief's announcement, according to various media reports. Earlier this year, Nvidia announced $2 billion investment in Marvell Technology to deepen their strategic partnership.

title: ChatGPT app hits 1 billion monthly active users in record time, data shows
summary: ​The record comes amid growing competition between Anthropic ​and OpenAI for dominance in the rapidly ​expanding artificial intelligence market.

title: Court rules EU must drop strict curbs on Facebook Marketplace
summary: The appeal before the EU's General Court in Luxembourg regarded the platforms' designation under the Digital Markets Act (DMA), one of several EU digital laws facing fierce criticism from US President Donald Trump's administration.

title: TikTok billionaire overtakes Mukesh Ambani as Asia’s second-richest person
summary: Zhang’s net worth climbed to $92.8 billion, cementing his position as China’s richest person, according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index. The ByteDance cofounder’s fortune swelled more than sevenfold since Bloomberg started tracking his wealth in March 2019, when he was worth $13 billion.

title: Martin Scorsese embraces AI, teams up with company Black Forest Labs
summary: The Oscar-winning director, who has made classics such as "Taxi Driver", "Raging Bull", "Goodfellas", "Cape Fear", "The Aviator", "Shutter Island" and many more, said he has been using the company's FLUX generative AI model to create storyboards for an upcoming film.

title: Wipro CEO Pallia takes home Rs 49.6 crore in FY26
summary: Pallia's total compensation of $5,290,568 included $1.65 million in salary and allowances, $1.05 million in commission and variable pay, $2.47 million in other benefits, and $108,464 in long-term compensation.

title: UK regulator enforces new competition requirements on Google search
summary: The Competition and ‌Markets Authority ⁠has ⁠flagged concerns about Google's dominance in search services. Google accounts for ​more than 90% of UK queries, and the regulator had been ​consulting on the matter to ensure effective competition.

title: Acko hires Meta, Junglee Games executives to lead health, auto insurance businesses
summary: The appointment comes at a time when Acko is preparing for an initial public offering(IPO). In April, ET reported that the Bengaluru-based company had confidentially filed draft papers for an IPO, which is expected to raise around $250 million.
